items.name_cn:
🆕22 Handbag Black Silver
 Original box calfskin grade A👍 Fine and glossy leather,
Soft yet durable, possessing both qualities
Simple appearance hiding many designer's high-end designs, hollow Chanel logo coins, small embellishments elevate the overall temperament by more than one level, full of retro sentiment, a relaxed lazy vibe! 🍃
Dimensions: 39*42*8cm

items.name_cn:
🆕24N Ski Series Black Velvet Hobo🖤
Velvet nylon material, super soft and smooth to the touch,
Tech material has a nice luster
Feels durable and not easy to get dirty, perfect for a casual vibe, looks vintage yet very practical
Plus, the nylon is super light with huge capacity, this bag is very accommodating!!
Adjustable strap, can be worn underarm or crossbody,
Suitable for both petite and tall frames
Size: 20*32*12cm
CH: 5054

specs.rawTitle:
🆕24N Ski Series Black Velvet Hobo🖤

Plus, the nylon is super light with huge capacity, this bag is very accommodating!!
Adjustable strap, can be worn underarm or crossbody,

items.name_cn:
🆕Classic Calfskin Hammock Flip Bag
Model 33705
The Hammock Flip Bag interprets a classic silhouette with a soft texture and practical functionality, while continuing the series' iconic details. Featuring a creative stitching and flip structure, it easily converts between a shoulder bag and a compact Hobo bag. This version is crafted from classic calfskin.
Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld
Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
Magnetic snap closure
One external zip pocket, two internal slip pockets
Herringbone cotton canvas lining
LOEWE hot stamping or silver stamping
Dimensions 15-22-21 cm

specs.rawTitle:
🆕Classic Calfskin Hammock Flip Bag
Model 33705
The Hammock Flip Bag interprets a classic silhouette with a soft texture and practical functionality, while continuing the series' iconic details. Featuring a creative stitching and flip structure, it easily converts between a shoulder bag and a compact Hobo bag. This version is crafted from classic calfskin.
Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld
Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
Magnetic snap closure
One external zip pocket, two internal slip pockets
Herringbone cotton canvas lining
LOEWE hot stamping or silver stamping
Dimensions 15-22-21 cm

24B Chain Clutch Black ♥

items.name_en: 🆕N40748 Blue Check! The 'zippie wallet' from the 'damiericious' series reinterprets damier canvas with charming colors. A special edition item, this iconic wallet features a slim silhouette and a round zipper closure, creating a fresh and feminine atmosphere with soft colors. The cleverly designed interior is divided into multiple compartments for bills, cards, and documents. 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm

items.name_en: 🆕Top-tier Original M69797 Beige This Zippy coin purse is made of Monogram Empreinte calfskin, highlighting the color contrast of the embossed Monogram pattern. The compact shape features a wide opening for easy access and can be easily slipped into a handbag or pocket.
items.name_cn:
🆕Top-tier Original M69797 Beige This Zippy coin purse is made of Monogram Empreinte calfskin, highlighting the color contrast of the embossed Monogram pattern. The compact shape features a wide opening for easy access and can be easily slipped into a handbag or pocket.
